mapper.select: SELECT r.id as roomId, #{month} as month, #{waterCold} as waterCold, #{waterHot} as waterHot, #{electricUsage} as electricUsage, (#{waterCold} * c.price_water_cold) as costWaterCold, (#{waterHot} * c.price_water_hot) as costWaterHot, (#{electricUsage} * c.price_electric) as costElectric, ((#{waterCold} * c.price_water_cold) + (#{waterHot} * c.price_water_hot) + (#{electricUsage} * c.price_electric)) as totalAmount FROM dorm_room r INNER JOIN sys_campus c ON r.campus_id = c.id WHERE r.id = #{roomId}
